references.title: A Fuzzy-Based Multi-agent Model for Group Formation in Collaborative Learning Environments
references.journal: A Fuzzy-Based Multi-agent Model for Group Formation in Collaborative Learning Environments

annotations.text: Efficient groups are pivotal towards success in collaborative learning settings. The authors use Belbin typology (which has 9 possible roles in groups) to propose a Fuzzy-based Multi-Agent Model fgor group formation.
The authors use a fuzzy logic to classify role performance inside the group. Authors create a prototype and test the effectiveness of their approach via a case study.
